source_pr.title: planner: support sync loading for mv index stats
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?


Issue Number: ref #46539



### What is changed and how it works?

- Add a new util function `findTableByTblOrPartID` to get the metadata given a table id or a partition id. And replace several repeated code snippets with this function.
- In the stats sync loading logic, after we collect the needed columns from the expressions, add a new step to collect the virtual columns that directly depend on the needed columns.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. This PR stabilizes it by: slices.Sort(cols) (planner/core/plan_stats_test.go).
